agot_apply_posthistory_manual_effect = {
	# Note: The regular posthistory effect got automated by scrapping the history files for unfiring commands
	# This isn't foolproof, it can't read "ifs" properly, so some more complex stuff needs to be amended here
	character:Wildling_Chief_5 ?= { # The Eeper
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_alive = no
				has_game_rule = agot_silly_mode
			}
			give_nickname = nick_agot_historical_the_eeper_silly_mode
		}
	}
	character:Rogers_28 ?= { # Endron Storm
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = no }
			make_trait_active = surname_storm
			remove_trait = surname_storm
		}
	}
	character:Rogers_29 ?= { # Benedict Storm
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = no }
			make_trait_active = surname_storm
			remove_trait = surname_storm
		}
	}
	character:Rogers_30 ?= { # Amber Storm
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = no }
			make_trait_active = surname_storm
			remove_trait = surname_storm
		}
	}
	character:Targaryen_94 ?= { # Daemon Blackfyre
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = no }
			make_trait_active = surname_waters
			remove_trait = surname_waters
			set_father = character:Targaryen_88
		}
	}
	character:Stark_150 ?= { # Artos Snow, son of Sara Snow
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = no }
			make_trait_inactive = surname_snow
		}
	}
	character:Targaryen_88 ?= { # Aegon the Unworthy
		if = {
			limit = { is_alive = no }
			make_trait_inactive = historical_fat
		}
	}
}

agot_adjust_adult_traits_posthistory_effect = {
	if = {
		limit = { age < 12 }
		remove_trait = lustful
		remove_trait = chaste
		remove_trait = authoritative
	}
	if = {
		limit = { age < 6 }
		remove_trait = greedy
		remove_trait = generous
		remove_trait = wrathful
		remove_trait = calm
		remove_trait = patient
		remove_trait = impatient
		remove_trait = arrogant
		remove_trait = humble
		remove_trait = deceitful
		remove_trait = honest
		remove_trait = craven
		remove_trait = brave
		remove_trait = shy
		remove_trait = gregarious
		remove_trait = ambitious
		remove_trait = content
		remove_trait = arbitrary
		remove_trait = just
		remove_trait = cynical
		remove_trait = zealous
		remove_trait = compassionate
		remove_trait = callous
		remove_trait = sadistic
		remove_trait = vengeful
		remove_trait = forgiving

		# Requires some work
		remove_trait = strong
		remove_trait = shrewd
	}
	if = {
		limit = { age < 3 }
		remove_trait = lazy
		remove_trait = diligent
		remove_trait = gluttonous
		remove_trait = temperate
		remove_trait = paranoid
		remove_trait = trusting
		remove_trait = stubborn
		remove_trait = fickle
		remove_trait = eccentric
		remove_trait = inquisitive
		remove_trait = rude
	}
}

agot_set_historical_feud_variable_effect = {
	add_to_variable_list = {
		name = historical_feud
		target = $HOUSE$
	}
	$HOUSE$ = {
		add_to_variable_list = {
			name = historical_feud
			target = prev
		}
	}
}

agot_apply_posthistory_house_relations_effect = {
	if = {
		limit = { game_start_date >= 6500.1.1 }
		dynasty:dynn_Yronwood.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Fowler.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
		}
		dynasty:dynn_Blackwood.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Bracken.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = feud
			}
			agot_set_historical_feud_variable_effect = { HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Bracken.dynasty_founder.house }
		}
		dynasty:dynn_Forrester.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			if = { # The Red Wedding
				limit = { game_start_date >= 8299.12.15 }
				set_house_relation_level_effect = {
					HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Whitehill.dynasty_founder.house
					REASON = historical
					LEVEL = feud
				}
				agot_set_historical_feud_variable_effect = { HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Whitehill.dynasty_founder.house }
			}
			else = {
				set_house_relation_level_effect = {
					HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Whitehill.dynasty_founder.house
					REASON = historical
					LEVEL = rivalry
				}
			}
		}
		dynasty:dynn_Falwell.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Jast.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
		}
		dynasty:dynn_Frey.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Reed.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
		}
		dynasty:dynn_Peake.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Manderly.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
		}
		dynasty:dynn_Caron.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Fowler.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
		}
		dynasty:dynn_Tarly.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Blackmont.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
		}
		dynasty:dynn_Swann.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Wyl.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
		}
		dynasty:dynn_Dondarrion.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Yronwood.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
		}
		dynasty:dynn_Selmy.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Manwoody.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
		}
		dynasty:dynn_Vardok.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Covehold.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
		}
		dynasty:dynn_Hightower.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Dayne.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
		}
		dynasty:dynn_Yronwood.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Wyl.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = friendly
			}
		}
		dynasty:dynn_Dennecent.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Eager.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = friendly
			}
		}
		dynasty:dynn_Darklyn.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {

		}
		dynasty:dynn_Stark.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Arryn.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = cordial
			}
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Tully.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = cordial
			}
		}
		dynasty:dynn_Arryn.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Tully.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = cordial
			}
		}
	}
	if = { # Sack of King's Landing
		limit = { game_start_date >= 8283.9.1 }
		house:house_Martell ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Lannister.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Lorch.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = feud
			}
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Clegane.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = feud
			}
			agot_set_historical_feud_variable_effect = { HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Clegane.dynasty_founder.house }
			agot_set_historical_feud_variable_effect = { HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Lorch.dynasty_founder.house }
		}
	}
	if = { # Death of Robert Baratheon
		limit = { game_start_date >= 8298.10.24 }
		house:house_BaratheonKL ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Baratheon.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Targaryen.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = feud
			}
			agot_set_historical_feud_variable_effect = { HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Targaryen.dynasty_founder.house }
		}
	}
	if = { # Execution of Ned Stark
		limit = { game_start_date >= 8299.1.10 }
		dynasty:dynn_Stark.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Lannister.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = house:house_BaratheonKL
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
		}
	}
	if = { # Conversion of Stannis Baratheon
		limit = { game_start_date >= 8299.3.3 }
		house:house_BaratheonDS ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = house:house_BaratheonKL
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Targaryen.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = feud
			}
			agot_set_historical_feud_variable_effect = { HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Targaryen.dynasty_founder.house }
		}
	}
	if = { # The Red Wedding
		limit = { game_start_date >= 8299.12.15 }
		dynasty:dynn_Frey.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Stark.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = feud
			}
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Umber.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Mormont.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = house:house_FlintWW
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
			if = { # Frey Pies
				limit = { game_start_date >= 8300.4.18 }
				set_house_relation_level_effect = {
					HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Manderly.dynasty_founder.house
					REASON = historical
					LEVEL = feud
				}
				agot_set_historical_feud_variable_effect = { HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Manderly.dynasty_founder.house }
			}
			else = {
				set_house_relation_level_effect = {
					HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Manderly.dynasty_founder.house
					REASON = historical
					LEVEL = rivalry
				}
			}
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Locke.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Norrey.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Blackwood.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Piper.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Vance.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = rivalry
			}
			agot_set_historical_feud_variable_effect = { HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Stark.dynasty_founder.house }
		}
		dynasty:dynn_Bolton.dynasty_founder.house ?= {
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Stark.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = feud
			}
			set_house_relation_level_effect = {
				HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Manderly.dynasty_founder.house
				REASON = historical
				LEVEL = feud
			}
			agot_set_historical_feud_variable_effect = { HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Bolton.dynasty_founder.house }
			agot_set_historical_feud_variable_effect = { HOUSE = dynasty:dynn_Manderly.dynasty_founder.house }
		}
	}
}
